title: How to automatically set Due Date of a task to the latest due date of all subitems?
excerpt:
Hello. 
I’d like to make so that the Due Date of a task automatically matches the latest due date of its subitems. I couldn’t find an automation to do that. Maybe a formula?? 
Did anyone do something like this before?

posts.author: cquad (Camilla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.
I’d like to make so that the Due Date of a task automatically matches the latest due date of its subitems. I couldn’t find an automation to do that. Maybe a formula??
Did anyone do something like this before?

posts.author: V.B.Music (Mike  Alducin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @cquad. Apparently, there is still no way to relate the subitems to the main item columns, however what you are looking for is just what I am looking for. It would be excellent to be able to relate the subitems to the general item, not only in their due date, but also in their automations. I’m sure Monday is already reviewing this because it has been something that a lot of people are looking for.
